name: 04-28-llm-client-extension
title: LLM Client Extension - OpenAI/Claude/Ollama/OpenRouter
description: Extend LLM client to support OpenAI, Claude, Ollama, and OpenRouter backends for tavern NPC chat.
creator: lijin
notes: Implemented: 24+ backends including OpenAI, Claude, Ollama, OpenRouter, Azure, Groq, DeepSeek, Mistral, Cohere, Fireworks, Moonshot, xAI, Perplexity, Pollinations, and TextGen backends. Factory pattern, streaming support, token counting.
